pi_items.verified_value: SPY - State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust Wikipedia. SPY is a real, actively traded ETF on NYSE Arca (NASDAQ equivalent). The most widely traded S&P 500 ETF in the world.

pi_items.verified_value: Red is one of 11 available instrument link colors in NinjaTrader 8
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader documentation and forum posts on window linking (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/linking_windows.htm) confirm that NinjaTrader 8 supports color-based instrument linking with multiple color options including Red.

pi_items.verified_value: Chart and SuperDOM are both valid window types in NinjaTrader 8
pi_items.source: Official NinjaTrader documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/superdom.htm and charting documentation) confirm Chart and SuperDOM are core window types.

Yahoo Finance, CNBC, NASDAQ official data. AAPL is the stock ticker for Apple Inc., trading on the NASDAQ exchange. One of the most valuable public companies globally with a market cap of approximately $3.9 trillion (as of 2026).

pi_items.verified_value: Blue is one of 11 available instrument link colors in NinjaTrader 8
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader documentation confirms Blue is an available instrument link color option in the platform's window linking system (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/linking_windows.htm).

pi_items.verified_value: Chart and TimeAndSales (Time & Sales) are both valid window types in NinjaTrader 8
pi_items.source: Official NinjaTrader documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/timeandsales_usingthetimeandsaleswindow.htm) confirms TimeAndSales/Time & Sales is a core window type for viewing real-time trade data. Chart window is standard.

pi_items.verified_value: C:\Users\<username>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces is the correct workspace directory location for NinjaTrader 8
pi_items.source: Official NinjaTrader support documentation and forum posts (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/workspaces_menu.htm and forum thread 'Where are Workspaces & Templates Saved?') confirm this is the standard workspace directory. The metadata uses 'Docker' as the username, which is appropriate for container deployments.

privileged_info_summary: All verified metadata claims relate to NinjaTrader 8 configuration: SPY is the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, a major US equity ETF. AAPL is Apple Inc. stock. Red and Blue are valid instrument link colors supported by NinjaTrader 8 for grouping windows. Chart, SuperDOM, and TimeAndSales are legitimate window types in NinjaTrader 8. The workspace directory location (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces) follows the correct standard path pattern for NinjaTrader 8. The task creates a synthetic workspace configuration at runtime; no external data sources are involved.
